summary: Evaluated implementation vs PRD: 72% match. Core ops, error types, batchGet/batchSet, readOnly mode, stat/metadata, and symlinks implemented. Partial gaps in scan() streaming (OPFS/AgenticStore load full content), OPFS walkDir error typing, and JSDoc on backend classes. Missing: test suites (all backends), cross-backend consistency tests, README, and docs. Updated .team/gaps/prd.json with current timestamp.
